text:
On Mon, 30 Oct 2006 19:42:28 UT, Edwin Groothuis wrote
> Maintainer of graphics/potrace,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/104943 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a 
> bug fix you agree on, reply to this email stating that you 
> approve the patch and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/104943

Approved.
